'''Mudmub''' was one of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] sent by [[Risso Nu]] to catch [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] on [[Ma'ar Shaddam/Legends|Ma'ar Shaddam]]. A [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]], he was the partner of a [[Mudmub's Rodian partner|Rodian bounty hunter]]. Mudmub died when he was strapped with explosives that were detonated.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|18|Number Two in the Galaxy}} {{1st}}
